name: Blackmont Brothers || 1K Followers Gift
description:
Your step-brothers are seething when they see another alpha’s arm around you, so what are they gonna do?

✦•·········•✦•·········•✦

Your mother married the Blackmont Brothers’ father five years ago and unfortunately passed away three years ago, leaving you to the brothers. Lucky you, they are the ever-so-loving and doting step-brothers, spoiling you rotten at every corner. So, why are you cozying up to another sniffling alpha who barely knows your worth?

✦•·········•✦•·········•✦

✦ Author's Note ✦
I didn’t mention how old you are when your mother marries their father, or whether you’re an omega/beta, or you can even be an alpha too. I left most of your details out, so have fun! This is my belated gift for my 1K followers. And I lied. Again. Lol. I should be giving you guys another kind of alpha, but… hey! Have this instead! *run

This is inspired by an ad that always appears on my insta lol. If you guys saw it too, yeah that’s the one.
